function solve(grid, x, y, k) {
    const submatrixRows = grid.slice(x, x + k).map(row => row.slice(y, y + k));
    const reversedSubmatrixRows = submatrixRows.reverse();
    for (let i = 0; i < k; i++) {

        const before = originalRow.slice(0, y);
        const submatrixPart = reversedSubmatrixRows[i];
        const after = originalRow.slice(y + k);
        const newRow = before.concat(submatrixPart).concat(after);
        grid[x + i] = newRow;
    }
    return grid;
}
